summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 4.8.2 (Microstructure A/B Validation), Phase 4.8.3 (Microstructure Weighting), and Phase 4.8.4 (A/B/C Weighting Validation) - all 21 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate
passed_tests: Phase 4.8.2 - Validation Health: ok:true, version 4.8.2, module micro_backtest_validation
Phase 4.8.2 - Validation Run: returns base_metrics, micro_metrics, comparison, impact, validation
Phase 4.8.2 - Validation Checks: wrong_early_improved=true, stop_out_improved=true, net_edge_positive=true, missed_good_controlled=true
Phase 4.8.2 - Validation Latest: returns latest run result
Phase 4.8.2 - Validation History: returns run history with count
Phase 4.8.3 - Weighting Health: ok:true, version 4.8.3, components [size_modifier, confidence_modifier, execution_modifier]
Phase 4.8.3 - Strong Micro: size_multiplier=1.15, execution_modifier=AGGRESSIVE, weighted_decision=GO_FULL
Phase 4.8.3 - Weak Micro: size_multiplier<=0.8, execution_modifier=PASSIVE_LIMIT, weighted_decision=GO_REDUCED
Phase 4.8.3 - Blocked Micro: size_multiplier=0.0, weighted_decision=WAIT_MICROSTRUCTURE
Phase 4.8.3 - Weighting Stats: returns statistics with total count
Phase 4.8.4 - A/B/C Health: ok:true, version 4.8.4, module micro_weighting_ab_validation
Phase 4.8.4 - A/B/C Run: returns base_metrics, filter_metrics, weighting_metrics, comparison, impact, verdict
Phase 4.8.4 - Comparison Structure: has filter_vs_base, weighting_vs_filter, weighting_vs_base sections
Phase 4.8.4 - Impact Structure: filter has avoided/missed/net_edge, weighting has upgraded_size_wins/oversized_losses
Phase 4.8.4 - Verdict: CASE_1_IDEAL with recommendation KEEP_WEIGHTING
Phase 4.8.4 - A/B/C Latest: returns latest validation result
Phase 4.8.4 - A/B/C History: returns history with count
Backward Compat - Phase 4.8 Microstructure Health: version 4.8, 5 engines operational
Backward Compat - Phase 4.8 Mock Supportive: ENTER_NOW, entry_permission=true
Backward Compat - Phase 4.7 MTF Health: version 4.7
Backward Compat - Phase 4.5 Integration Health: version 4.8.1
seed_data_creation: None - used built-in simulated trade datasets with deterministic seed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4.8.2-4.8.4 are fully tested and working. Phase 4.8.2 (Microstructure A/B Validation) compares Base (no micro) vs Micro (with filter) on identical trade sets, validating that micro filter improves wrong_early, stop_out, and net_edge. Phase 4.8.3 (Microstructure Weighting) applies size_multiplier (0.0-1.15), confidence_modifier, and execution_modifier based on micro quality. Phase 4.8.4 (A/B/C Weighting Validation) compares Base vs Filter vs Weighting, producing verdicts (CASE_1_IDEAL/CASE_2_GOOD/CASE_3_HARMFUL/CASE_4_FAILURE) with recommendations. With seed=42, the system produces CASE_1_IDEAL verdict with KEEP_WEIGHTING recommendation. All backward compatibility with Phase 4.5-4.8.1 endpoints is preserved.
